title: epidendrum milpoense
intro: Epidendrum milpoense is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Peruvian folk medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Epidendrum milpoense include its ability to alleviate symptoms of asthma, bronchitis, and other respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Epidendrum milpoense are typically made by infusing the plant's roots and leaves in hot water, which can be consumed as a tea or used as a topical treatment.
